title: Receipt
description: Transaction receipt read from the station via BLE characteristic FFF6 (Read). Contains the complete record of a completed service session for offline reconciliation. v0.4.2: outer wrapper includes offlinePassId / userId / deviceId for symmetry with the signed inner body (06-security.md §6.2 receipt_fields). v0.6.0: discriminated (oneOf) — pass-form carries {offlinePassId, passCounter} (N7); auth-form (Partial A) carries {authId, sessionId} (Q4); both mirror the signed receipt.data body.

offlinePassId.description: Pass-form only. OfflinePass identifier used to authorize this service. Matches the value signed into receipt.data per 06-security.md §6.2.

passCounter.description: Pass-form only. The pass's app-global usage counter, matching the value signed into receipt.data (finding N7).

authId.description: Auth-form (Partial A) only. ServerSignedAuth authId, matching the value signed into receipt.data (finding Q4).

sessionId.description: Auth-form (Partial A) only. Server-issued session, matching the value signed into receipt.data (finding Q4).

userId.description: User subject identifier. Matches the value signed into receipt.data per 06-security.md §6.2 (v0.4.2).

deviceId.description: Device identifier from the BLE Hello / OfflinePass binding. Matches the value signed into receipt.data per 06-security.md §6.2 (v0.4.2).

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the service started

endedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the service ended

durationSeconds.description: Total duration of the service in seconds

meterValues.description: Final meter readings from the completed service

txCounter.description: Monotonically increasing transaction counter for chain integrity
